title: Carburettor Carb Kit for Honda GX35 GX25 FG110 HHT25 HHT35, ADEFOL Carburetor + Gasket + Fuel Filter + Air Filter + Spark Plug + Primer Bulb Engine Replacement Parts Kit 9 in 1
features: 【Compatible With】 For Honda GX35, GX25, GX35NT, GX25N, GX25NT series 4-stroke engine. Fits Honda HHT25S FG110 FG110K1 Rototiller, HHT35 HHT35S UMC435 string trimmer / brushcutter.
【9 in 1 Carb Kit】 Contains everything needed for maintenance: 1 × Carburetor, 1 × Gasket, 2 × Primer Bulb, 1 × Fuel Hose, 1 × Fuel Line, 1 × White Filter, 1 × Black Filter, 1 × Spark Plug.
【Easy to Install】 Based entirely on the original design, all our replacement parts are built with precise size, and will fit your equipment perfectly and work smoothly.
【OEM Part Number】 For Carburetor: # 16100-Z0Z-034, # 16100-Z0Z-815, # 16100-Z0H-825, # 16100-Z0H-053, # WYB-16C. For Air Filter: Honda # 17211-Z0H-800.
【Quality Assurance】 Each of our spare parts is engineered and tested to rigorous standards. If you find any replacement parts not applicable or not durable, we will offer 100% refund.
description: From the brand Previous page ABOUT US As a professional supplier, we specialize in high quality replacement parts for most models of chainsaws, grass cutters, mowers and other electrical equipment. Our parts strictly follow OEM standards, specifications are 100% identical to OEM parts. Therefore, you will find that replacement work is quick and easy.
